offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient documentation causes delays in claim approvals. We automate the conversion of field service reports instead of manual documentation processes.
problem: Inefficient conversion of field service reports into insurance claim documents.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters

try_it: Let users try template-based document generation for claims

Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
